title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Direct - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Direct - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Direct in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Direct:
ICICI Direct is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Direct!
